text_block_list.text:
One day, while watching Narita Brian's dance
practice...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Phew... Well, guess this is it. Although this is just
an added bonus to watching the race, I can't be
too lax about it.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Whoa! You're a good dancer, Brian!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, Mayano. I'm in the middle of a lesson, so
don't bother me.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Roger that! Sorry!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh... but I may have found your weakness. ♪

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What weakness?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Well, I don't think you smile enough. ♪

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...But I am smiling, just as choreographed. I'm
smiling right when I'm supposed to.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Well, your normal face is already a bit scary, so I think you've gotta smile even more. ♪

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
You sure don't mince words... But I disagree. It's
not necessary.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
What?! It totally is! You agree, don't you,
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hey, don't entertain her nonsense!
choice_data_list: Let's at least give it a try!
Let's at least give it a try!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hey, don't entertain her nonsense!
choice_data_list: Let's at least give it a try!
Let's at least give it a try!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Tch! Why, you...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I knew it! ♪ All right, then, I'll join you for
smiling practice! ♪

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I never said I was going to do it.
choice_data_list: Do it for a better performance!
Do it for a better performance!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Fine. All I have to do is smile, right?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: See? It's not like it's hard!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. How should I put this... Your dance moves
are sharp, but...
choice_data_list: Your expression is also quite sharp.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
What?! It's not like I'm angry or anything. I swear
I'm smiling!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Don't get angry. Just give us a smile! ♪

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I told you I'm not angry!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: You sure look angry!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm. Looks like I have no choice but to take
charge of this lesson!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: No, wait... Ugh, give me a break...

Under the fervent guidance of Mayano Top Gun,
Narita Brian takes a crash course in smiling and
seems to glean something from it.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Eh?! Why?!
choice_data_list: Brian's cool smile is her selling point.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I'm not trying to sell anything, you know...
But, fine, let's just go with that.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, I don't get it. What do you mean? Smiling
doesn't matter?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Heh, it means there's more than one way to smile.
You'll understand when you grow up.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! You mean if I understand it, I'll be a
grown-up?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Wh-what's with the dreamy eyes all of a sudden?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I got it! I'm gonna take this chance to study your
coolness!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Don't worry! I won't bother you!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: If you don't bother me, then fine... Suit yourself.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! So that's a "cool" way to answer, right?! I'm
already learning so much! ♪

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Uh, sure... This isn't going to be easy, is it...

Surprisingly, Brian does her lesson with more
vigor than usual because of the extra eyes on her.
